title: Black and white Maces
description: This resource pack makes the breach mace white and the density mace black with a little bit of purple on both, its perfect for MacePVP and compatible with all other resource packs
body: This resource pack is made for pvpers who have trouble switching maces and is perfectly compatible with other resource packs as long as you put it in the top. This resource pack changes the breach mace to white and the density mace to black, inspired by mace essentials.
